eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Lane, OR; at 8:16 PM on JUL 28, 2019 Effective until 12:16 AM JUL 29, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Lane County Emergency Manager has issued a Level 1 Evacuation  Get Ready  notice for 37066 Wallace Creek Road to Panorama near Jasper due to fire. Residents should monitor local media.
